name: student-presentation-suite
description: Student presentation planning, PPTX generation/improvement, and review suite with shared standards, image strategy, Slide Spec handoff, anti-AI wording checks, and static PPTX review.

interface.shortDescription: 规划、生成和审阅大学生演示，覆盖 Q&A、AI 写作风险和版本对比。
interface.longDescription: Three Codex skills for student presentation planning, editable PPTX production or improvement, and evidence-based review. Includes Slide Spec handoff, classroom readability rules, speaker notes, visual presets, change summaries, and static PPTX risk checks.
capabilities: Student presentation outlines and Slide Spec handoff
Editable PPTX creation and existing-deck improvement
Speaker notes, visual presets, and classroom QA
Deck review, scoring, and AI-writing risk checks
Static PPTX inspection and change summaries
defaultPrompt: 帮我规划一个大学课程汇报的 PPT 大纲和逐页讲稿。
帮我生成或改进一个可编辑的大学生课堂汇报 PPTX。
帮我审查已有学生 PPT，并给出逐页修改建议和评分。
